industries.title: Accounting for Startups in Estonia
industries.description: Special accounting considerations for early-stage companies, including investor reporting, burn rate tracking, and cap table management.

industries.title: Accounting for SaaS Companies in Estonia
industries.description: Revenue recognition (ASC 606/IFRS 15), subscription billing, MRR/ARR metrics, and deferred revenue for SaaS businesses.

industries.title: E-commerce Accounting Guide for Estonia
industries.description: VAT on cross-border sales (OSS/IOSS), marketplace reporting, inventory accounting, and payment gateway reconciliation.

industries.title: Accounting for Freelancers in Estonia
industries.description: Tax obligations for self-employed, invoicing requirements, deductible expenses, and quarterly reporting for freelancers.

industries.title: Crypto Company Accounting in Estonia
industries.description: Special accounting rules for cryptocurrency businesses, FIU reporting requirements, and valuation of digital assets.
